text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been invited by Sakura Bakushin O to see the
end-of-year Arima Kinen, an annual contest
where the racers are picked through a public poll.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder which Umamusume will win this year? I'm
getting riled up just thinking about it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Did you vote? You know, my pick was—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! Look at how many people are out
there—it's great!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To a class representative, there's just something
about a class this size!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The more people, the more trouble! And the more
trouble, the more a class representative gets to
do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's about to start!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: That reminds me, I need to put in this call—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You there! Class is about to start! All phones
should be turned off!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Yes, sorry, ma'am! ...Wait, class?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the Arima Kinen officially kicks off. An
event chock full of the best of the best
Umamusume and the vigilant crowd taking in
their every move...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The experience of seeing the best Umamusume
out there racing against each other is more than
enough to get your heart pumping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sure of it now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Isn't this race basically made for me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How do you think someone becomes a class
representative?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Because of their smarts? Their speed-eating
skills? Because they've gained the trust of their
teachers? Their walking speed?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All of these things are needed. However, none of
them are the most important thing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the most important thing is... Take it away,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That is utterly incorrect!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The correct answer is "popularity"! The class
representative is a stand-in for the people's trust!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The participants of the Arima Kinen are decided
through a fan vote. In other words, it is a
gathering of the most popular Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And as the popular class representative, there
isn't a race better suited to me than this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's definitely get in next year! The Arima Kinen
is calling my name!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...As it is right now, the chances of her running the
entire length of the Arima Kinen are next to zero.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, if I find a way to siphon that motivation
into her training, I'm sure she'll get even stronger.
That might just work...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes!
choice_data_list:
What is the most important thing about running
in the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Being a class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's not?! ...Then just what could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I see what you're getting at, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I should brush up my speed and then Bakushin my
Baku-shot at the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Understood! I will take you up on that suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, heh, heh... My speed will bring in the
numbers... I can see it now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Do not fear, everyone, you won't have to wait for
me long!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will run in this race and live up to my title as
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: ...Class representative?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I succeed in lighting a fire under her, making her
more passionate than ever about speed.
